name: Madeleine's Neighborly Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a temperature that will produce a light crust.
2. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
4. Cover and let the dough rise until doubled in size.
5. Bake the bread until it has a light, golden-brown crust.
